top_signals.title: Gold Steadies as Traders Weigh Prospects for US-Iran Peace Deal
top_signals.summary: Gold steadied as traders weighed prospects for a long-awaited deal to end the US-Iran war that’s rattled global markets and stoked inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Paris defense show may be last chance to buy before war, CEO says
top_signals.summary: Surging defense spending means Eurosatory is bigger than ever this year, with the number of exhibitors rising 30% to more than 2,600, per the organizer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI buildout weighs on bitcoin demand but future gains could reverse trend, Relai CEO says
top_signals.summary: Julian Liniger, CEO of Relai, said the current bitcoin bear market is driven in part by liquidity absorbed by AI investments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Guidance: Government financial reporting manual: application guidance
top_signals.summary: Application guidance on IFRS implementation for the public sector context.

top_signals.title: Telefónica Weighs Ending Movistar Cycling Team Sponsorship
top_signals.summary: Telefónica SA is looking to cut sponsorship of a road cycling team in the sport’s premier championship as part of a broad review of marketing spending, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_signals.title: ‘Unsustainable’ – Iceland boss and Labour peer calls for end of triple lock pension
top_signals.summary: Lord Walker, the influential Iceland boss who was made a Labour peer, has called for the triple lock pension to be scrapped as the mechanism was “profoundly unfair”.  In a debate on welfare reform in the House of Lords, Walker added to a growing number of economists and political figures calling for the state pension [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: In a first, consultations in Japan about social media top 100,000
top_signals.summary: Those in their 50s and older accounted for more than half of the total social media-related consultations to consumer affairs centers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
